title: By saying that Yeshua was life that was with the father, and that life went out from or left the father, is he saying Yeshua is the blood of the father that came out, came down on us? Is this connected to the weird verse in the book of Acts where Jesus is called the father's blood? If the life is in the blood, and the life has come out of the father, and that life is named Yeshua, then he is the life of God poured out for the world via even the incarnation.
author: joshualinog
